latin: In summo monte, Madeline umbram suam invenit. umbra omnes timores et dubitationes eius erat. non pugnare sed amplecti eam debuit. cum partem sui accepisset, vere fortis facta est.

questions.prompt: What must Madeline do with her shadow?

translation: At the top of the mountain, Madeline found her shadow. The shadow was all her fears and doubts. She had to not fight but embrace it. When she had accepted that part of herself, she became truly strong.
